risks.description: Peak-load performance target may be hard to meet on the current architecture.
risks.mitigation: Load test early; introduce caching/horizontal scaling if needed.

tradeoffs.tradeoff: Strong consistency vs. availability under partition
tradeoffs.decision: Favour availability with eventual consistency for non-critical reads
tradeoffs.rationale: Uptime target outweighs strict read freshness for these paths.

open_questions_list.question: What is the confirmed monthly availability SLA with the business sponsor?

decisions.description: Confirm the regulatory baseline applicable to the data domain.

glossary.definition: Recovery Time Objective / Recovery Point Objective — targets for restoring service and bounding data loss after an incident.
